content: Calendar is a component from @gravity-ui/date-components for selecting a single date. Supports controlled and uncontrolled modes, min/max date constraints, disabled dates, and multiple view modes: days, months, quarters, and years. Built on top of @internationalized/date. Import: import {Calendar} from '@gravity-ui/date-components';

Calendar props: defaultValue (DateTime) uncontrolled initial value; disabled (boolean) disables the calendar; focusedValue (DateTime) controlled focused date; isDateUnavailable (function) marks dates as unavailable; maxValue (DateTime) maximum selectable date; minValue (DateTime) minimum selectable date; mode ('days' | 'months' | 'quarters' | 'years') calendar view mode; onFocusUpdate (function) callback on focus change; onUpdate (function) callback when date is selected; readOnly (boolean) makes calendar read-only; size ('s' | 'm' | 'l' | 'xl') calendar size; timeZone (string) IANA timezone identifier; value (DateTime) controlled selected date.
Basic Calendar usage for date selection.

DateField is a text input from @gravity-ui/date-components for entering a date and/or time value following a specified format. Each date segment (year, month, day, hour, minute, second) is independently editable via keyboard. Import: import {DateField} from '@gravity-ui/date-components';

DateField props: defaultValue (DateTime) uncontrolled initial value; disabled (boolean) disables the field; errorMessage (string) validation error message; format (string) date format string; hasClear (boolean) shows clear button; label (string) field label; maxValue (DateTime) maximum date; minValue (DateTime) minimum date; onUpdate (function) callback on value change; placeholder (string) placeholder text; readOnly (boolean) makes field read-only; size ('s' | 'm' | 'l' | 'xl') field size; timeZone (string) IANA timezone; validationState ('invalid') validation state; value (DateTime) controlled value.
DateField usage for a date input with clear button.

DatePicker is a component from @gravity-ui/date-components that combines a DateField input with a Calendar popup for selecting a single date. Supports controlled and uncontrolled modes, min/max constraints, disabled dates, and various sizes. Import: import {DatePicker} from '@gravity-ui/date-components';

DatePicker props: defaultValue (DateTime) uncontrolled initial value; disabled (boolean) disables the picker; errorMessage (string) validation error message; format (string) date format string; hasClear (boolean) shows clear button; isDateUnavailable (function) marks dates unavailable; label (string) field label; maxValue (DateTime) maximum date; minValue (DateTime) minimum date; onUpdate (function) callback on value change; placeholder (string) placeholder text; readOnly (boolean) makes read-only; size ('s' | 'm' | 'l' | 'xl') size; timeZone (string) IANA timezone; validationState ('invalid') validation state; value (DateTime) controlled value.
DatePicker usage for selecting a date with a calendar popup.

RangeCalendar is a component from @gravity-ui/date-components for selecting a date range with start and end dates. Extends the Calendar component with range selection support including hover highlighting. Import: import {RangeCalendar} from '@gravity-ui/date-components';

RangeCalendar shares all Calendar props but operates on a RangeValue<DateTime> instead of a single DateTime. Key props: value (RangeValue<DateTime>) controlled range value with start and end; defaultValue (RangeValue<DateTime>) uncontrolled initial range; onUpdate (function) callback receiving RangeValue<DateTime>; minValue (DateTime) minimum selectable date; maxValue (DateTime) maximum selectable date; isDateUnavailable (function) marks dates unavailable.
RangeCalendar usage for selecting a date range.

RelativeDateField is a component from @gravity-ui/date-components for entering relative date expressions such as 'now-7d', 'now/d', or absolute dates. Parses relative syntax and resolves to actual DateTime values. Import: import {RelativeDateField} from '@gravity-ui/date-components';

RelativeDateField props: defaultValue (RelativeDateFieldValue) uncontrolled initial value; disabled (boolean) disables the field; errorMessage (string) validation error message; hasClear (boolean) shows clear button; label (string) field label; onUpdate (function) callback on value change; placeholder (string) placeholder text; readOnly (boolean) makes field read-only; size ('s' | 'm' | 'l' | 'xl') field size; timeZone (string) IANA timezone; validationState ('invalid') validation state; value (RelativeDateFieldValue) controlled value.
RelativeDateField usage for a time range filter input.

RelativeDatePicker is a component from @gravity-ui/date-components that combines a RelativeDateField input with a Calendar popup. Allows selecting both absolute dates via calendar and entering relative date expressions like 'now-7d'. Import: import {RelativeDatePicker} from '@gravity-ui/date-components';

RelativeDatePicker props: defaultValue (RelativeDatePickerValue) uncontrolled initial value; disabled (boolean) disables the picker; errorMessage (string) validation error; hasClear (boolean) shows clear button; isDateUnavailable (function) marks dates unavailable; label (string) field label; maxValue (DateTime) maximum date; minValue (DateTime) minimum date; onUpdate (function) callback on value change; placeholder (string) placeholder; readOnly (boolean) makes read-only; size ('s' | 'm' | 'l' | 'xl') size; timeZone (string) IANA timezone; validationState ('invalid') validation state; value (RelativeDatePickerValue) controlled value.
RelativeDatePicker usage combining calendar and relative date input.
